items.title: Bring the benefits of composting to your gardens with this 43-gallon East Oak dual-chamber compost bin at its $66 low
items.summary:
East Oak 43-Gallon Outdoor Tumbling Compost Bin

Buy for $66 (Reg. $85)

What we love

More and more people are learning about the benefits that composting can bring to gardens, and this 43-gallon tumbler is a handy and sensible way to integrate the practice into your life, with it becoming a popular model in NYC that I regularly see in people’s yards and even atop apartment building rooftops. There are two chambers, one for completing the compost process, while the other is for your freshly discarded scraps. Its ability to rotate 360 degrees does away with hand mixing, and it comes with a BPA-free design using PP material for its construction, as well as steel for more eco-friendly durability.

items.title: EAST OAK’s cordless heated lunch boxes keep meals hot and ready until you’re hungry starting from a new $65 low
items.summary:
Over at Amazon, you can find a handy workplace companion in the EAST OAK 1.3-Liter Cordless Electric Heated Lunch Box that starts from $65.01 shipped right now, with multiple colorways and larger 1.5-liter counterparts on the same landing page. Normally, this particular model would run you $85 at full price, but since mid-March its been hanging out down at this rate, with past discounts having stayed above $76, with a few more recent falls to $69 and $66. The deal here gives you a 24% markdown off the going rate, saving you $20 at a new all-time low price while you upgrade your lunch with a portable means to keep food warm until you’re ready to eat – whether that is at work, on trips in nature, or more.

items.summary:
ExtreLife AirTag-ready 6-Card MagSafe Wallet

Buy for $10 (Reg. $17.50)

What we love

There are plenty of MagSafe wallets with Apple Find My built right in, but those often need to be charged every few months. This offering lets you pop an AirTag inside and benefit from 1-year battery life with no charging required.
